info.title: Rapidata Campaign API
info.description: The API for the Rapidata Campaign service

get.summary: Returns the current state of the in-memory campaign cache.
Returns the current state of the in-memory default user score cache.
Returns an attributed view of the aggregated boosting profile.
Returns the current boost status including active and inactive campaigns.
Retrieves the details of a specific campaign.

parameters.name: campaignId
parameters.description: The identifier of the campaign to update.

parameters.name: campaignId
parameters.description: The identifier of the campaign to pause.

get.summary: Queries campaigns with optional filtering, sorting, and pagination.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort fields. Prefix with - for descending order (e.g. -created_at).

parameters.name: campaignId
parameters.description: The identifier of the campaign to resume.

put.summary: Sets or clears the manual global boost level.

requestBody.description: The manual global boost level to apply. Null clears the manual override.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort fields. Prefix with - for descending order (e.g. -created_at).

isManual.description: Whether the manual overwrite should be applied.

isActive.description: Whether the boost is active. Deprecated in favor of Level.

level.description: The boost level. Takes precedence over IsActive when set.

manualOverrideLevel.description: The manual override level, if manual mode is active.

globalBoost.description: Global boost insight with contributing campaigns.

activeCampaigns.description: The list of active campaign identifiers.

inactiveCampaigns.description: The list of inactive campaign identifiers.

unknownCampaigns.description: The list of unknown campaign identifiers.

id.description: The unique identifier of the campaign.

priority.description: The priority level of the campaign.

hasBooster.description: Whether the campaign has a booster.

requiresBooster.description: Whether the campaign requires a booster.

filters.description: The targeting filters for this campaign.

selections.description: The rapid selections for this campaign.

featureFlags.description: The feature flags configured for this campaign.

ownerMail.description: The email of the campaign owner.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the campaign was created.

count.description: The total number of cached campaigns.

campaigns.description: The list of cached campaign summaries.

count.description: The total number of cached user scores.

id.description: The unique identifier of the campaign.

priority.description: The priority level of the campaign.

hasBooster.description: Whether the campaign has a booster.

requiresBooster.description: Whether the campaign requires a booster.

ownerMail.description: The email of the campaign owner.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the campaign was created.

name.description: The name of the external audience.

count.description: The number of users in the audience.

level.description: The global boost level. Null disables manual mode and returns to automatic.

name.description: The new name for the campaign.

priority.description: The new priority value for the campaign.

filters.description: The targeting filters for the campaign.

selections.description: The rapid selections for the campaign.

featureFlags.description: The feature flags for the campaign.

Bearer.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme

OAuth2.description: OAuth2 authorization header using the Bearer scheme
